title: Onboarding screens - Login button without wifi [New]
scenario: Onboarding Login button shows "Something is wrong" screen when WiFi is turned off
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
2. Accept the License Agreement and Privacy Policy on the onboarding screen.
3. Turn off WiFi on the device.
4. Tap the Login button on the onboarding screen.
expected: The "Something is wrong" screen appears, indicating no network connection.
